subcodes.first_line: O Concourse of Creation! Hearken unto that which the Lord of Names doth speak from within the Prison of 'Akká. Verily, there is none other God but [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ملا الانشاء ان استمعوا ما ینطق به مالک الاسماء فی سجن عکاء انه لا اله الا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @belief and denial, @spiritual transformation, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @proclamation to the people of the world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
